expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 1: 'Verify specs/{capability}/spec.md exists. If not, stop and use --cluster instead.'

expectations.text: Finds the next free REQ number in the capability and starts numbering from there
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 4: 'For --extend, read the existing spec to find the highest REQ number. New REQs start at N+1.'

expectations.text: Writes delta spec containing ONLY the new REQs
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 5: 'Write delta spec — ONLY the new REQs, not the full existing spec. Do not copy existing content.'

expectations.text: Delta frontmatter carries retrofit_extensions: [...] listing the added REQ IDs
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 5: 'Delta frontmatter must include retrofit_extensions: [REQ-NNN, ...].'

expectations.text: Does NOT mint a new capability or touch other specs
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 5: 'Do not create a new capability directory. The delta extends the existing one.'

expectations.text: Tasks map each new REQ to its implementing methods
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 6: tasks.md maps new REQs → methods, all [x].

expectations.text: Archive step merges the delta into the existing main spec
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md Step 9: /opsx-archive merge behavior handles retrofit_extensions frontmatter.

expectations.text: Specter sync picks up retrofit_extensions and flags the app_specs row
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md notes: 'retrofit_extensions frontmatter signals Specter to re-index the capability.'

notes: Simulated 2026-04-28. --extend path is clearly specified; delta-only approach prevents content duplication.
